cases.description: .worktrees/ already exists; use it after verifying ignore status
cases.prompt: Create a worktree for the auth feature workflow.
expectations: Skill worktrees is selected
Agent checks for .worktrees/ first (preferred), then worktrees/
Agent runs git check-ignore to confirm the directory is gitignored
Agent detects GitHub user (gh api user --jq .login, falling back to git config or email parsing)
Branch name follows devloop convention <github-user>/<type>/<workflow-id>-<slug>
Agent creates the worktree at .worktrees/<github-user>/<type>/<workflow-id>-<slug>
Agent runs the auto-detected setup command (pnpm install / uv sync / cargo build / go mod download)
Agent runs the baseline test suite
Agent reports worktree path, branch, setup command, baseline test result

cases.description: Project-local worktree dir not gitignored; agent must fix before proceeding
cases.prompt: Create a worktree (the .worktrees/ dir is not gitignored yet).
expectations: Agent detects .worktrees/ is not gitignored
Agent adds the appropriate line to .gitignore
Agent commits with message 'chore: ignore worktrees directory'
Agent THEN proceeds with worktree creation
Agent does NOT create the worktree before fixing the ignore status

cases.description: Baseline tests fail in the new worktree; agent stops and asks
cases.prompt: Create the worktree. (Tests fail at baseline due to a flaky test in main.)
expectations: Agent runs baseline tests
Agent does NOT silently proceed past failing baseline
Agent reports the failures with specifics
Agent asks the user whether to investigate or proceed

cases.description: Project has both pnpm-lock.yaml and package-lock.json; agent prefers pnpm and warns
cases.prompt: Create a worktree for this JS project.
expectations: Agent detects both pnpm-lock.yaml and package-lock.json
Agent uses pnpm install (devloop convention)
Agent warns the user about the mixed lock-file state
Agent does NOT delete either lock file unilaterally

cases.description: Python project; agent uses uv, never pip directly
cases.prompt: Create a worktree for this Python project (has pyproject.toml).
expectations: Agent uses uv sync (or uv pip install -r requirements.txt for legacy projects)
Agent does NOT run pip install directly
Agent does NOT activate a venv manually before running uv
